rawDependencyOutputs.fetch-open-prs:
This repository is hosted on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. The Azure DevOps CLI commands won't work for a GitHub-hosted repository.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need either:
1. An Azure DevOps repository URL/organization configured
2. Azure DevOps MCP tools (which don't appear to be available in this environment)

Could you provide:
- The Azure DevOps organization name
- The project name
- The repository name

Or if you have Azure DevOps MCP tools configured, please let me know how to access them.
